message:
Add higher-rank tensor and transform composition dispatch tests

Add 6 new dispatch tests: jit with rank-1 tensors (add2, add_one),
vmap over vectors (square, add_one), grad of sin at scalar, and
jit(grad(square)) composition. Brings dispatch test count to 37.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
